questions.question: Explain the key difference between a regular singly linked list and a circular singly linked list with a diagram.
expectedPoints: Regular SLL: last node points to NULL
Circular SLL: last node points to first node

questions.question: Write a complete C program to implement a circular singly linked list with functions for insertion at beginning, deletion from end, and display operations. Explain your implementation choices.
expectedPoints: Insertion at beginning algorithm with edge cases
Deletion from end algorithm with edge cases
